history.entry: I'm so stressed about my exams I haven't slept properly in days and I feel like I'm going to fail everything

matches.ayah: So, surely with every hardship there is ease;
matches.ayah_ar: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا

matches.ayah: God asked him, "What is the matter with you, that you are not among those who have prostrated themselves?"
matches.ayah_ar: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ

matches.ayah: If God were to take people to task for their wrongdoing, He would not leave even one living creature on earth, but He gives them respite till an appointed time: when their time comes they cannot delay it for an hour, nor can they bring it forward.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَوْ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِظُلْمِهِم مَّا تَرَكَ عَلَيْهَا مِن دَآبَّةٍۢ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ سَاعَةًۭ ۖ وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: as a blessing from Us: this is how We reward the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ

matches.ayah: He has made me blessed wherever I may be, and has enjoined upon me prayer and almsgiving throughout my life.
matches.ayah_ar: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّۭا

matches.ayah: Truly, your Lord is bountiful to mankind, but most of them are not grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: and We are nearer to him than you, although you cannot see Us --
matches.ayah_ar: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ

matches.ayah: It will be a Day when no human being shall be of the least avail to any other human being, God \[alone\] will hold command on that Day.
matches.ayah_ar: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌۭ لِّنَفْسٍۢ شَيْـًۭٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلَّهِ

matches.ayah: Does he then think that no one sees him?
matches.ayah_ar: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّمْ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: Seek help with patience and prayer; this is indeed an exacting discipline, but not to the humble,
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱلْخَٰشِعِينَ

matches.ayah: Believers, be steadfast in the cause of God and bear witness with justice. Do not let your enmity for others turn you away from justice. Deal justly; that is nearer to being God-fearing. Fear God. God is aware of all that you do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوا۟ قَوَّٰمِينَ لِلَّهِ شُهَدَآءَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَلَا يَجْرِمَنَّكُمْ شَنَـَٔانُ قَوْمٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَلَّا تَعْدِلُوا۟ ۚ ٱعْدِلُوا۟ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: Obey God and His Messenger, and avoid dissension, lest you falter and are no longer held in awe. Have patience: God is with those who are patient.
matches.ayah_ar: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَا تَنَٰزَعُوا۟ فَتَفْشَلُوا۟ وَتَذْهَبَ رِيحُكُمْ ۖ وَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

history.comfort: Your anger makes sense. أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ — seek refuge in Allah. He is Just; He sees everything. 🌿

history.entry: I'm exhausted completely drained I have nothing left to give I can't go on like this anymore

matches.ayah: God only did this to give you good news, and so that your hearts might be set at rest, for help comes from God alone. Surely, God is Mighty and Wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بُشْرَىٰ وَلِتَطْمَئِنَّ بِهِۦ قُلُوبُكُمْ ۚ وَمَا ٱلنَّصْرُ إِلَّا مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: God wishes to lighten your burdens, for, man has been created weak.
matches.ayah_ar: يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ أَن يُخَفِّفَ عَنكُمْ ۚ وَخُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ ضَعِيفًۭا

matches.ayah: Lord, grant that I may keep up the prayer, and so may my offspring. My Lord, accept my prayer.
matches.ayah_ar: رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْنِى مُقِيمَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِى ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَآءِ

history.comfort: Rest is not weakness — even our Prophet ﷺ rested. Be gentle with yourself today. Allah sees your effort even when you feel you have nothing left. 🤍

history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: Believers, take care of your own souls. The misguided cannot harm you as long as you are guided. All of you will return to God. Then He will make you realize that which you used to do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ لَا يَضُرُّكُم مَّن ضَلَّ إِذَا ٱهْتَدَيْتُمْ ۚ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ جَمِيعًۭا فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: And if they would betray you, they betrayed God before, and He gave \[you\] power over them. God is aware and wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِن يُرِيدُوا۟ خِيَانَتَكَ فَقَدْ خَانُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مِن قَبْلُ فَأَمْكَنَ مِنْهُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: if you have suffered a wound, they too have suffered a similar wound. We bring these days to men by turns, so that God may know those who believe, and choose witnesses from among you; and God does not love the unjust,
matches.ayah_ar: إِن يَمْسَسْكُمْ قَرْحٌۭ فَقَدْ مَسَّ ٱلْقَوْمَ قَرْحٌۭ مِّثْلُهُۥ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَيَّامُ نُدَاوِلُهَا بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَيَتَّخِذَ مِنكُمْ شُهَدَآءَ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: I feel hopeful today I really believe things are going to get better inshallah making dua and trusting Allah

matches.ayah: there is good news in this life and in the Hereafter: the Word of God shall never change. That is the supreme triumph.
matches.ayah_ar: لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِكَلِمَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

matches.ayah: So be patient, for what God has promised is sure to come. Ask forgiveness for your sins; praise your Lord morning and evening.
matches.ayah_ar: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِبْكَٰرِ

matches.ayah: We hope our Lord will forgive us, as we are the first of the believers."
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

history.comfort: That hope you feel? Hold onto it — it is a gift from Allah. He who gave you the hope will give you the thing you hope for, in His perfect time. 💛

history.entry: I don't know which direction to take in life I feel so lost and unclear about everything what to do

matches.ayah: We have thus revealed a Spirit to you \[Prophet\] by Our command: you knew neither the Scripture nor the faith, but We made it a light, guiding with it whoever We will of Our servants. You are indeed guiding to the straight path,
matches.ayah_ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ رُوحًۭا مِّنْ أَمْرِنَا ۚ مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِى مَا ٱلْكِتَٰبُ وَلَا ٱلْإِيمَٰنُ وَلَٰكِن جَعَلْنَٰهُ نُورًۭا نَّهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن نَّشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۚ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَهْدِىٓ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ

matches.ayah: Then We set you on a clear path \[of religion\]: so follow it, and do not yield to the desires of those who have no knowledge.
matches.ayah_ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

matches.ayah: Father, I have been given some knowledge which has not come to you, so follow me: I shall guide you along a straight path.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًۭا سَوِيًّۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel calm and at peace today my heart feels settled and I'm just grateful for everything around me

matches.ayah: those who believe and whose hearts find comfort in the remembrance of God -- surely in the remembrance of God hearts can find comfort.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ

matches.ayah: whose hearts are filled with awe at the mention of God; who endure adversity with fortitude, say their prayers regularly and spend out of what We have given them.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَهُمْ وَٱلْمُقِيمِى ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ

matches.ayah: There is truly a reminder in this for whoever has a heart, whoever listens attentively.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Alhamdulillah for this peace. It is a sign that your heart is close to Allah. Protect this feeling through dhikr and gratitude. 🌿

history.entry: Today was a day. I just sat there. Things happened. I don't know.

matches.ayah: The believer said, "My people, follow me! I will guide you to the right path.
matches.ayah_ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِىٓ ءَامَنَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ ٱلرَّشَادِ

matches.ayah: Men, you have received clear evidence from your Lord. We have sent down a clear light to you.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ قَدْ جَآءَكُم بُرْهَٰنٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ نُورًۭا مُّبِينًۭا

matches.ayah: Your Lord knows best who has strayed from His Way and He knows best those who are guided.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ مَن يَضِلُّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۖ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel sad and lost today

matches.ayah: We have sent you forth as a mercy to all mankind.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةًۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I feel anxious and stressed about everything in my life right now

matches.ayah: He who submits himself completely to God, and is a doer of good, has surely grasped a strong handle, for the final outcome of all events rests with God.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ وَمَن يُسْلِمْ وَجْهَهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحْسِنٌۭ فَقَدِ ٱسْتَمْسَكَ بِٱلْعُرْوَةِ ٱلْوُثْقَىٰ ۗ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: Stay well away from an orphan's property, except with the best intentions, before he comes of age. Give full measure and weight, according to justice, We never charge a soul with more than it can bear, when you speak, observe justice, even though it concerns a close relative; and fulfil the covenants of God. That is what He has enjoined upon you so that you may take heed.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا۟ مَالَ ٱلْيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبْلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ ۖ وَأَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَإِذَا قُلْتُمْ فَٱعْدِلُوا۟ وَلَوْ كَانَ ذَا قُرْبَىٰ ۖ وَبِعَهْدِ ٱللَّهِ أَوْفُوا۟ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: We never sent any messengers before you who did not eat food and walk in the market-place. We make some of you a means of trial for others, to see whether you are steadfast. Your Lord is all seeing.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۗ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍۢ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًۭا

matches.ayah: Who responds to the oppressed when he calls out to Him, and relieves his suffering and who will make you inheritors of the earth? Then, is there a god besides God? How little you pay heed!
matches.ayah_ar: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: God! There is no deity save Him, the Living, the Sustainer.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَىُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: Whatever blessing you have is from God, and to Him you turn for help when distress befalls you,
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍۢ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ

matches.ayah: So remember Me; I will remember you. Be thankful to Me and do not be ungrateful.
matches.ayah_ar: فَٱذْكُرُونِىٓ أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَٱشْكُرُوا۟ لِى وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ

matches.ayah: Therefore, you should worship God alone and be among the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

bookmarks.ayah: Say, "If God's abode of the Hereafter is for you alone, to the exclusion of all others, then wish for death, if you are truthful."
bookmarks.ayah_ar: قُلْ إِن كَانَتْ لَكُمُ ٱلدَّارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِصَةًۭ مِّن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
